# StudySnap

StudySnap is a high-performance web application designed to help students capture, structure, listen to, and revise notes using artificial intelligence.

## Docs

- https://studysnap.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/surajkumar/studysnap

## Features

- Note taking with auto-save and rich text
- Voice notes with transcription
- Text-to-speech for any note
- AI chat, summarization, MCQs, flashcards, translation
- Spaced repetition revision system
- PWA offline support
- Dark mode
